svg.title: Token Usage Dashboard Mobile — telemetry
svg.desc: Mobile token usage telemetry: 49.8B tokens, 92.9% cache hit, $49,626.96 estimated cost, peak 5.9B on 06-06. Pure SVG SMIL animation.
